name: UltraLight Running Tee
description: A featherweight quick-dry running tee designed for hot weather training and long-distance road runs.

reviews.text: Super breathable on summer runs and dries fast after washing.
Comfortable fit with enough room through the shoulders.

name: HeatShift Training Tank
description: Moisture-wicking training tank with four-way stretch for lifting, HIIT, and studio sessions.

reviews.text: Great for spin class and doesn't cling when sweaty.
Arm holes are flattering and the fabric feels premium.

name: Summit Merino Base Layer
description: Soft merino wool blend base layer for cool-weather hiking, camping, and alpine layering.

reviews.text: Warm without overheating and works well under a shell.
Softer than expected for merino and not itchy at all.

name: StudioFlow Cropped Tee
description: Soft cropped tee with drape and stretch for yoga, barre, and low-impact movement.

reviews.text: Really soft fabric and sits perfectly with high-rise leggings.
Great casual gym-to-coffee top.

name: TrailShade Sun Hoodie
description: UPF-rated lightweight hoodie for trail running, hiking, and sunny adventure days.

reviews.text: Perfect desert hiking layer with good sun coverage.
Breathes well and packs down small in a daypack.

name: Pulse Compression Top
description: Performance compression top that supports muscle recovery during high-intensity training sessions.

reviews.text: Snug in the right way and feels supportive during lifting.
Good recovery shirt for basketball practice days.

name: StrideSplit Run Shorts
description: Split-hem running shorts with mesh liner and a rear zip pocket for race-day essentials.

reviews.text: Excellent for speed work and very little chafing.
Pocket fits a key and gel without bouncing too much.

name: CoreLift Joggers
description: Tapered training joggers with stretch waistband and ankle zips for gym warmups and everyday wear.

reviews.text: Easy to wear to the gym and comfortable on flights too.
Taper is clean and not too skinny around the calves.

name: StudioGrip Leggings
description: High-rise leggings with a smooth second-skin feel for yoga, Pilates, and walking.

reviews.text: Soft enough for lounging but supportive in class.
Waistband stays put during long yoga sessions.

name: RidgeLine Hiking Pants
description: Abrasion-resistant hiking pants with articulated knees and water-resistant finish for rugged trails.

reviews.text: Held up well scrambling over rocks and brush.
A little structured at first but breaks in nicely.

name: SwiftWeave Bike Shorts
description: Mid-thigh bike shorts with supportive compression and side pockets for training and casual wear.

reviews.text: Great compression and the side pockets are actually useful.
Comfortable for strength training and errands after.

name: CloudStride Daily Runner
description: Cushioned daily trainer with breathable mesh upper and soft foam midsole for everyday miles.

reviews.text: Very comfortable for easy runs and long walks.
Foam is soft without feeling unstable.

name: TrailBlazer Edge
description: Grippy trail running shoe with rock guard, aggressive lugs, and reinforced toe protection.

reviews.text: Outstanding traction on loose dirt and wet rocks.
Protective forefoot makes descents feel safer.

name: CourtShift Trainers
description: Stable low-profile cross-training shoe made for lifting, agility drills, and short cardio bursts.

reviews.text: Very stable under heavy squats and deadlifts.
Works best for gym sessions rather than long runs.

name: Recovery Slide One
description: Soft recovery slide with contoured footbed for post-workout comfort and casual daily wear.

reviews.text: Perfect after long runs when my feet are beat up.
Cushiony and surprisingly supportive for slides.

name: PaceSprint Racer
description: Lightweight road racing shoe with responsive foam and a snappy forefoot for tempo days and events.

reviews.text: Feels quick and lively for 5K and half marathon efforts.
Upper is secure but the fit runs a touch narrow.

name: StormShield Shell
description: Packable waterproof shell for rainy hikes, travel, and unpredictable forecast days.

reviews.text: Kept me dry through steady rain on a weekend hike.
Easy to stash in a backpack and doesn't feel bulky.

name: ThermaZip Midlayer
description: Warm brushed midlayer with half-zip ventilation for cool morning runs and outdoor training.

reviews.text: Ideal layer for chilly sunrise runs.
Soft inside and not too heavy for active use.

name: WindCut Runner Jacket
description: Ultralight windbreaker with vented back panel for breezy road runs and shoulder-season training.

reviews.text: Blocks wind well without getting stuffy.
Very easy to pack into a small running vest.

name: CityCommute Puffer Vest
description: Light insulated vest for cool commutes, travel layering, and everyday casual wear.

reviews.text: Warm core layer without restricting arm movement.
Looks good enough to wear beyond workout settings.

name: GripCore Training Gloves
description: Breathable lifting gloves with padded palm and wrist support for gym sessions.

reviews.text: Helps on pull days and palms don't get torn up.
Breathable enough for long gym sessions.

name: HydraRun Belt
description: Minimal running belt with soft flask storage and secure phone pocket for distance training.

reviews.text: Doesn't bounce much even on longer runs.
Phone pocket fits a large device securely.

name: Thermal Knit Beanie
description: Soft thermal beanie for winter runs, hiking, and cold-weather commuting.

reviews.text: Keeps ears warm during freezing morning walks.
Not itchy and looks great off the trail too.

name: FlexMat Carry Strap
description: Adjustable carry strap for yoga mats with soft woven loops and compact travel-friendly design.

reviews.text: Makes carrying my mat to class much easier.
Simple but sturdy and looks nicer than expected.
